hypothesis: Jointly training an SE(3)-equivariant 3D electron-density encoder with a SMILES transformer under the multimodal contrastive objective will produce embeddings that simultaneously exceed (a) the unseen SO(3) retrieval Accuracy@10 and pose-diversity of the non-equivariant SMILESDFT-CLIP model and (b) the HOMO-aligned clustering (lower Davies–Bouldin index) and QM9 linear-probe MAE of the Pos-EGNN baseline.
